channel.title: NATK Nyazika, R Kaela, M Mugoni, K Musomekwa, E Kyei-Baafour, S Chiwanda, PT Mapondera, TS Makawa, EM Sithole, G Mavunganidze, J Manasa, KC Jambo, C Musarurwa | PlatCOVID

item.title: Implementation of Antibody Rapid Diagnostic Testing versus Real-Time Reverse Transcription-PCR Sample Pooling in the Screening of COVID-19: a Case of Different Testing Strategies in Africa.
